Be sure to eXamine EVERY room on the Space Ship!
The Amulet of Life is on a little desert island on level #5.
To win the game, you must defeat Ronney, get Tut's Treasure & the Holy Grail.
Galadriel will ask you a question about Middle Earth. The reward is great.
Items given to your ally, can not be LOOTed.
A compass is needed for successful travel in the Great Desert.
The Tool Kit repairs the spacesuit if you have both parts, & the Communicator
PRAY only works if you have no food or drink.
The Vial of Galadriel can be found in an underground river on level #2.
REST is a good way to get out of a bind.
The best way to dispatch the King of the Wraiths is with the Nuclear Rocket.
